programmes.show_description: This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Baby Jake Loves Jumping. The adventures of magical Baby Jake and friends. Baby Jake and the Hamsternauts go on a space adventure and enjoy jumping.
Go Jet Academy: Hurricane Rescue. Meet the Go Jetters, four explorers on a global adventure! The team is plunged into the eye of the storm as Glitch flies Jetpad into a hurricane.
Face Paint. Sula paints Bing to look like Biteysaurus, but upsets Bing by accidentally adding purple.
Lost Parcel Day. Love Monster helps Delivery Duckling try to deliver a lost parcel so she can keep her 100 per cent delivery record, but all the clues they find send them down dead ends.
Mojo Mail. What top would be best for delivering parcels around town? Mojo and Bo need to decide fast and get those parcels delivered, whether it's by land, water, or high in the air!
Sleepyhead Koko. Koko let her excitement get the best of her and stayed up all night!
Playtime. The Jungle Park is full of baby Vegesaurs. Ginger and the Pea-Rexes invent a game for everyone to play.
Potato. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Potato dedicating a song to his Uncle Spud.   Followed by My Petsaurus.
The Throne Thief. Someone has stolen Evil Pea's throne, and all clues point to Supertato as the thief!
Dandelion. Children's animation. After blowing the seeds off some dandelions, Bing decides to take one to Sula. Bing negotiates many windy hazards to keep the dandelion safe.
Birthday. It's Bing's third birthday, but there's trouble when he teaches his friends the waka-oke.
The Lost Property Badge. The Squirrels lose Tag in the Clubhouse but to find him they're going to have to figure out where the Lost Property room is.
The Mountain Badge. The Squirrels need to rescue Enid when they see her at the top of the Mighty Sugar Bun Mountain.
Hollywood, USA. When Glitch and Kyan star in a Hollywood movie, the Go Jetters swap autograph books for Click-Ons to save the Hollywood sign. Get ready for lights, camera and lots of action!
The Tale of the Falling Rock. Animated series. Peter and his friends realise that a hibernating Mrs Tiggy-Winkle is in the path of a landslide!
The Humuhumunukunukuapua'a. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. The Octopod's waterworks become flooded with frightened humuhumu fish.
Pig Gets Big. Felix causes chaos as a giant pig, but Mojo and Bo are right on his huge, curly tail!
The Zen Den. Sophie must infiltrate the sports hall without disturbing a relaxation class Val is running. Her aim is to retrieve bibs, goals and a big bag of footballs.
Imagination. Educational series using Makaton sign language. Mr Tumble pretends to be a doctor, while Justin and his friends imagine that they are pirates.
Yoga Ball. Mum teaches Bingo how to use her big girl bark to keep their fun within her limits.
Tradies. Bluey and Bingo spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard.
The Comic Badge. Duggee is reading the Squirrels one of his favourite comics. They are eager to know the ending, but the comic was discontinued!
The Senses Badge. Roly has lost his best potato, but Duggee finds it using his sense of smell.
Sink or Stink. The Piris devise a smelly solution when hungry seagulls almost capsize the iceberg.
A Big Day Out for D.O.R.I.S. Dad gets trapped in the shower when D.O.R.I.S. decides to visit the sea. Can Big Lizard and Cosima stop her before she does herself permanent damage?
Dance-Off. Ginger and the Pea rexes help a Strawberrisaurus find courage for a special friendship dance.
Everglades National Park, Florida. Meet the Go Jetters, four explorers on a global adventure! The Go Jetters save the day when hungry alligators chase Glitch's picnic.
Mission Thief. Weasy gets the blame for eating all the popcorn! It's time to find the real thief.
Tricky Tricky Trapster/Tractor Beam Trouble. Spidey teams up with Thing. Spidey's tech is taken.
Twelve-Year Bloom. A search for a gift for Captain Barnacles leads the Vegimals and Shellington to India.
Wondervole. Benjamin loses his Wondervole toy and can't sleep without it. Can Stan help?
Home Swap. Evil Pea tricks Supertato into inviting her to stay. But as soon as she moves in, she takes over by completely freezing Tato Tower and Supertato.

programmes.show_name: New: Talking Tom Heroes: Suddenly Super
programmes.show_description: Where's the Fun Truck? The Rakoonz steal the Fun Truck, and the friends need to get it back without their powers.
Potato Train. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. The Small Potatoes hop on board the Potato Train and chug through town, greeting local townspotatoes along the way.
Recycling Day. Recycling day in the attic inspires several great makes. A pot becomes a hairdo, cheese boxes become octopuses and buttons become a brilliant box robot.
Ruby Robot. Jen starts a kitchen disco in the cafe, but the radio runs out of batteries.
Seaweed. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out all about seaweed.
Python and Pelican. Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet a reticulated python and pelicans.   Followed by Small Potatoes.
Waffle's Doggy Disco. A loud disco disrupts after-school club, but George has a solution, so Waffle can join in.
The Hide-and-Seek Badge. Animated preschool series. Duggee and the Squirrels play hide-and-seek. The Squirrels have hidden in good places, but Duggee finds them all - except Roly.
Swashbuckling Swordfish. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. In search of a mythical sword, Kwazii explores a pirate shipwreck.
Koa Nails It. Koa's nails are long and sharp, but he's afraid to cut them. Vida knows just how to make it fun - nail polish!
The Strokkur Geyser, Iceland. Animated adventure comedy series. The geysers in Iceland are blocked - Glitch is to blame, and it could cause an earthquake. Go Jetters go!
The Cat Wish. Rafi's wish reveals being a cat is hard, and to value Deborah's challenges.
Recycling Rhapsody. When the recycling gets blown over, Yukee and the gang pick it up and create music.
Sheep. Preschool series about animals that live together on a patchwork blanket. Patchwork Sheep has had her wool sheared off, and now she is cold! Can the Patchwork Pals help her?
Disco Party. There's a party, and you're all invited! Justin and his friend arrange a disco party with a difference, while Mr Tumble holds his own disco party at Tumble Cottage.
Dancing. Gemma, Benjee Bear and Bailee Bear invite toddlers and their grown-ups to explore dancing things through play, song and story. Little ones and grown-ups at home can play too!
Interesting. Kiri is bored of hearing that every day there are new and interesting things to discover.
Just a Little Knock. Cesar loves his vehicle, but Wilf crashes it. At first, Cesar isn't worried, but when the vehicle starts acting up, he struggles to admit it's broken.
Sunny's Picky Eating. Vida helps Sunny taste new things at the Sweetwood Food Festival.
Mega Action Ape. Preschool animation. It seems that all of Tee's friends have the brand new Mega Action Ape toy. Tee is desperate for one too, but it's not his birthday for ages.
What Animal Are You? The Game Catchers land on a Technological Planet to learn the game what animal are you? But before they can start, they must search for Nina!
Sweet Potatodon. A volcanic eruption nearby leads Sweet Potatodons to Lava Land, which upsets savoury kin.
School Caretaker. Dylan the caretaker wants to clean the school, so when he encounters some extra-sticky slime, he'll have to pull out all the mops!
Colours. Isla and Abbie join Aaron to discover all the amazing spring colours bursting out around the city garden - but what will they find?
Becca Drops In. The Heroes hide their identities when Becca lands at the hangout while they're training.
Mulch. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers make some mulch from things they have found in the garden. They learn about how mulch can help plants - especially in the winter.
The Dance Dispute. Pancake fumes when Nugget joins Dance Club and grabs the glory with his signature move.
Monteverde Cloud Forest, Costa Rica. The Go Jetters are in trouble when Glitch's feather collecting mission goes wrong.
A Windmill in Old Amsterdam. Dixie transforms into a mouse with clogs on and takes over a windmill.
How to Hoverboard. Cosima and Big Lizard's solar-powered hoverboards run out of battery at nightfall. Can glowbugs be the answer?
The Baby Wish. Rafi's wish turns her dads into babies. She realises being a grown-up means having responsibility - and that chores can be fun when mixed with dancing.
Nikhil and Jay and the Ginormous Carrot. It's the annual carrot challenge at the allotment. Nikhil and Jay want to help Appa dig up a ginormous carrot so he can beat Mr Awan!
Daddy Dropoff. Dad refuses to be late, but the girls quickly derail his plan with their games.
It's Time to Post a Picture. The internet goes down before JoJo can show Great Gran Gran a picture she's drawn.
Bobsleigh. Sarah and Duck learn to bobsleigh and have a speedy, snowy adventure with Scarf Lady's help.
I Want to Play Music Too. Children's animation with the siblings. Charlie and Marv must present a piece about outer space in front of the school. Lola is desperate to join in.
Dibillo's Juice Station. Pepi Nana, Moon Baby and their friends discover the toy roundabout in the Toy House.
I Spy. MeMo and BaBa enjoy playing I spy with my little eye but start using other senses to discover things: hearing with their little ears and smelling with their little noses.
Upsy Daisy, Igglepiggle, the Bed and the Ball. Igglepiggle decides to sleep in Upsy Daisy's bed when she goes after a ball. When Upsy Daisy discovers Igglepiggle, she chases him.
Emeli Sande - Too Many Tickles. Join Emeli Sande for a very funny story about a very tickly family.
This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Baby Jake Loves to Hum Along. The adventures of magical Baby Jake and friends. Baby Jake and Sydney the Monkey go on a tropical adventure and play humming.
The Valley of Balls, Kazakhstan. Meet the Go Jetters, four explorers on a global adventure! Can the Go Jetters take control of a rocky situation in the Valley of Balls?
Vaccination. Bing is brave for his vaccination as he is looking forward to the Hoppity Voosh sticker Dr Molly will give him afterwards. But then he finds out that there are none left!
Elders Away Day. Eager Beaver is left in charge of Fluffytown for the day and bosses everyone around.
Mojo Rocks. A rockslide blocks Ted the bus and his passengers in a mountain pass. Mojo's mighty dozer top will make short work of those rocks... if Mojo and Bo can work together!
Piperactive. Piper loves to play! But when the Trainees are given a job to do, playtime is cut short. Can Wilson, Koko and Brewster get Piper to put a pause on playtime?
Baby Boom. Baby Coconuts fall from trees and learn to walk on sand. Ginger and the Pea-Rexes help.
Grapes. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the spectacular acrobatic Grapes working together to perform the most difficult structures to perfection.   Followed by My Petsaurus.
Broccoli Alone. Supertato is out chasing a milkshake robot and leaves Broccoli in charge of Tato Tower. Evil Pea tries to take over the tower, but Broccoli puts on a great defence.
Voosh! Children's animation. Bing is vooshing with Hoppity around the garden, making him fly higher and higher. With one particularly enthusiastic throw, Hoppity disappears.
Playhouse. Sula, Pando and Bing find a bird's nest in their playhouse.
The Accessory Badge. The Squirrels see Duggee accessorising his tie and want to learn how to do it themselves. All of the Squirrels accessorise an item and showcase their goods.
The Ambition Badge. The Squirrels learn how to achieve their ambitions.
Fatberg, London Sewers, England. The Grimbots accidentally block London's sewers with a huge fatberg.
The Tale of Benjamin's Map. Animated series. After Benjamin gets lost in the woods, Peter and Lily give him a map to help him find his way home.
The Giant Spider Crab. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. Kwazii is spooked when he spots what looks like a giant underwater spider.
Pow Tao. Tao asks Mojo and Bo to help him film an action-packed snowboarding video, but Mojo is not so steady on the slopes. Which top can they swap to grab the white-hot snow shots?
Bear Rescue. Taran has lost his favourite teddy, can the Fantastics find it before it's too late?
Bedtime. Educational series using Makaton sign language. Mr Tumble wants a bedtime story, while Justin has a magical bedtime adventure with his friends.
Calypso. At school, Bluey and her friends throw themselves into various games. Teacher Calypso keeps her charges on track with a wise word and a song - all except the mysterious Pretzel.
Granny Mobile. Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale when a real grouchy granny shows up.
The Diplomacy Badge. Betty and Sergeant Ant just want perfection, but no one seems to be listening!
The Bridge Badge. It's bridge building time! The Squirrels help a quarreling group of Gerbils sort out their longstanding disagreement.
Looph's Frosty Feelings. When Looph unexpectedly loses a science competition, the Piris worry about her reaction.
The Earth Probe. Finding an earth probe makes Dad homesick. When Big Lizard accidentally destroys it, Cosima knows what to do. She recreates the contents - Proxima-style!
Hatchling. Ginger and the Pea-Rexes guide a lively baby Avocadodon back to its herd after it hatches.
The Sphinx, Egypt. Meet the Go Jetters, four explorers on a global adventure! The Go Jetters are in Egypt, where they need to make the Great Sphinx great again.
Mission Shield. The ducklings have fun in a toy car but don't respect the highway code imposed by Weasy.
The Campout Mystery/Gabby's Metal Menace. The heroes help Bigfoot. Gobby's dino makes Gobbybots.
Penguin Adventure. When his little brother Pinto gets trapped on a piece of ice, Peso has to rescue him.
Band. The kids write a new song and ask Stanley to make a special video of their performance - but it's really hard to find somewhere to do it! It's time for Stan to build a stage.
Galactic Space Showdown. Supertato and Chilli are playing a computer game when Evil Pea takes it for herself. To get it back, they suddenly find themselves in a real version of the game.

programmes.show_name: New: Talking Tom Heroes: Suddenly Super
programmes.show_description: Power Play. Professor Kranium hijacks the launch of the Peak City Heroes' action figures.
Small Potatoes' Waltz Dancing. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. The waltz is as easy as one, two, three when the Small Potatoes travel to Victorian-era Vienna!
Too Hot! A paper plate crab is the first make of the day, and an old wooden spoon becomes a spoon monster. The Recycling Express provides yogurt pots to make a palm tree.
Olive the Opera Singer. Jen and Small are finding it hard to hear each other today.
City Parks. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers discover how city parks play such an important role in the environment.
Coquerel's Sifaka and Vampire Crab. Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet Coquerel's sifakas and vampire crabs.   Followed by Small Potatoes.
Waffle's Bubble Trouble. When Waffle's bubble making gets out of control, Mrs Hobbs invites a bubble magician to save Waffle and the Woofs' final rock performance.
The Sheep Badge. Animated preschool series. The Squirrels are playing with their toys when they notice that there is a sheep in the clubhouse.
Triggerfish. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. When he is carried away by a cyclonic waterspout, Kwazii finds himself stranded.
Juno Mama Day. Juno can't wait for Juno Mama Day, but when Mama Hippo gets a cold, it's a very different day than Juno expected. Luckily, she learns that she's a great junior nurse!
The Aqueduct of Segovia, Spain. Animated adventure comedy series. Glitch turns Segovia Aqueduct into a giant water slide, and the Go Jetters must stop it toppling to the ground.
The Unicorn Wish. Rafi's unicorn wish brings exciting quests, but she realises even heroes need rest - and the best adventures can be found at home.
The New Sunhouse. Stripes wants to transform the Sunhouse, but he must learn that it is already perfect!
Polar Bear. Preschool series about animals that live together on a patchwork blanket. Patchwork Polar Bear is too hot and he's sweating! Can the Patchwork Pals help him?
Football Skills. Justin and his friend play football while The Tumble family compete for the Tumble Cup.
Holidays. Nigel, Benjee Bear and Bailee Bear invite toddlers and their grown-ups to explore holiday things through play, song and story. Little ones and grown-ups at home can play too!
A Lovely Nap. Lou has a series of misadventures whilst fast asleep, so Kiri exhausts herself trying to keep him safe.
What a Ding Dong. Keith and Rebecca think they've broken Fred's clock and call the Piggy Builders to fix it before he finds out. But the repair turns out to be impossible!
Daphne's Dental Day. Daphne is very excited to show off her clean teeth at the clinic's Dental Day.
Zoom! Preschool animation. Tee wakes up super-early and wants to play immediately. Mo wonders how much zooming is needed before everybody needs a nap.
Fly! Fly! The Game Catchers land on the Play Park Planet to play the balloon caterpillar.
Copy That. Dragonfruitflyus mimics Vegesaur sounds, which sparks a competition among Pea-Rex babies.
Delivery Driver. Dylan the driver wants to deliver his packages safely, but his final item of the day is going to be a real challenge.
Sounds of the Garden. Novah, Nelly and Aaron enjoy the amazing sounds of the city garden.
Hang Out Invaders. Jealous of the Heroes' parade, Professor Kranium sends a spy to help her get revenge.
Bat Boxes. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers learn why bat boxes are important places for bats to live. They explore the garden to see if they can spot some.
The Fishy Treasure Hunt. The Piris join a treasure hunt competition, but is Captain Krill all that he appears?
The Continent of Africa. Glitch and Tala get lost in Africa. Can the Go Jetters find them in this huge continent?
A Whole New World. Mae, Nadeem and Sheba ride a fun rollercoaster to explore the four corners of the world in a take on Aladdin's 'A Whole New World', performed in British Sign Language.
Hot and Cold. Volcanic smoke blocks the three Proximan suns, which causes Big Lizard to become worryingly cold. Cosima's on the case and comes up with a superhot solution!
The Stuck Together Wish. Rafi wishes her play date with Ruby could last forever. Stuck together, they realise that even best friends have differences - and that's what makes them special.
Nikhil and Jay and the Fairy Godbrothers. Nikhil and Jay become fairy godbrothers so that Nana and Amma can watch a band together!
Bingo. Bingo must learn how to play by herself. Luckily, Dad has a problem that needs solving.
It's Time to Catch the Bus. JoJo and Gran Gran miss their bus home, so the pair settle down to wait for the next one. But getting the bus isn't quite as simple as JoJo thinks it is...
Fireworks Dance. Animation. A game of hide-and-seek takes longer than usual when Duck gets scared by some fireworks.
I'm Far Too Extremely Busy. Children's animation with siblings Lola and Charlie. Lola does not have time to play, she is too busy organising her office and running her cafe.
Colly Wobble's Roller Skates. Colly Wobble wants to try some different shoes and chooses roller skates.
Up and Down and Upside Down. MeMo and BaBa have fun exploring up, down and upside down on the seesaw and as they play with the Yummies. What goes up, must come down!
Tombliboo Ooo Drinks Everybody Else's Pinky Ponk Juice. Children's programme. Everyone enjoys a ride on the Pinky Ponk, but Ooo is more interested in drinking Pinky Ponk juice.
Joe Talbot - The Boy With Flowers in His Hair. Joe Talbot reads a remarkable story about a very special friendship.
